title: Mel's DeCo
description: A furniture mod that covers various themes from classic furniture to futuristic, fantasy and more!
body:
---

![Mod Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hKHVYdoX/images/a157e5d87f6ce07473db24a6d43b4b260b61daaf.png 'Mels DeCo Title Image')

---

Mel's DeCo is a decor and cosmetics mod that adds a very wide variety of furniture options as well as some cosmetics for you to wear! It includes everything from classic furniture blocks like Tables, Counters and Cabinets to more interesting blocks like Holograms, LED Light Blocks and Particle Machines to completely unique features such as the Smileycopter!

Mel's DeCo (**De**corations/**Co**smetics) is perfect for creative building, while still being accessible to survival players, as it covers many building themes including classic town/city, cottagecore, fantasy, futuristic and more! Decorate your libraries with Books Rows and Book Stacks or your Kitchens and Cafés with the various decorative food items provided such as Bubble Tea, Baguettes, Strawberry Milk, Tiered Cakes and so many more! Throw a party with the Mirrorball, Balloons, Particle Machines and LED Lights or make your garden cuter with Baskets, Windchimes and Birdbaths!

---

---

When using the mod in survival it is recommended that you use a mod that can show you crafting recipes such as [JEI.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei)

Please note that *some* of the cosmetics are broken with Optifine! However, all decorative blocks as well as *some* cosmetics work just fine with Optifine and shaders installed!

---
